pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh which explicitly checks for this dataset path after extraction.
Verified against export_result.sh which uses this path to check for project existence and modification time.
Verified against export_result.sh and verifier.py which parse this file to grade the regression statistics.
Verified against verifier.py which computes the ground truth using these exact item columns.
Verified against verifier.py which requires the regression target and computed variable to use this exact name.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the real-world Big Five Inventory dataset (Revelle, 2010) extracted from the R datasets repository. The target variable 'Neuroticism_Mean' and the expected composite item inputs ('N1' through 'N5') are explicitly verified against the verifier script's ground-truth calculations. The expected project file path and report file path match the specific hardcoded paths checked by the export script.
